description: Novell NetWare Enterprise Web Server 5.1 and 6.0 allows remote attackers to obtain sensitive server information, including the internal IP address, via a direct request to (1) snoop.jsp, (2) SnoopServlet, (3) env.bas, or (4) lcgitest.nlm.
